item.name: Rose-colored Spectacles
item.description:
Wear these lenses to feel and exude optimism.*
* Optimism may or may not be warranted. Please act according to actual conditions. Though these were once considered a fashion accessory, trends are ever changing, and style enthusiasts now classify them as facewear. Use to unlock rose-colored spectacles.

ornament.name: Rose-colored Spectacles
ornament.description: Don a pair of rose-colored spectacles and exude incurable optimism.
